title: Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva located in the village Patia, Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India.
overview.description: Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva located in the village Patia, Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India. The enshrined deity is a Shiva lingam within a circular yoni pitha. The temple has a private ownership but is held by many people at the same time.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Jaleswar Siva Temple Precinct
topPlaces.description: Jalesvara Siva Temple Precinct is a Hindu Temple dedicated to Shiva situated on the southern outskirt of the village Kalarahanga at a distance of 2.00 km from Patia and 6.00 km south of Chudangagada in the northern outskirt of Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India. The presiding deity is a Siva-lingam within a circular yonipitha inside the sanctum, which is 1.15 meters below the chandrasila.

topPlaces.name: Kalabhairavi Temple
topPlaces.description: Kalabhairavi Temple is located at Bhubaneswar of Odisha, India (Location Lat- 20°21’ 40", Long- 85° 50’ 77", Elev- 76 ft) within the Jaleswar Siva Temple Precinct, Kalarahanga. The enshrined deity is a four armed Chamunda sitting over a dead body.

topPlaces.name: Central Tool Room and Training Centre, Bhubaneswar
topPlaces.description: Central Tool Room and Training Centre, located in Bhubaneswar, is an autonomous body under the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, Government of India. In addition to imparting technical training for the skill development of technical staff as well as students in the engineering and technical fields, the institute strives to foster the progress of micro, small and medium enterprises in the country and to facilitate the development of the youth.

image.alt: Central Tool Room and Training Centre, Bhubaneswar

topPlaces.name: Chandrasekharpur
topPlaces.description: Chandrasekharpur is a commercial area in Odisha's capital city, Bhubaneswar.

topPlaces.name: Gandarpur
topPlaces.description: Gandarpur is a village located in the northern part of the district of Khordha in the Indian state of Odisha. In 2011, the population was 3,109 persons in 606 households.

topPlaces.name: Bhubaneswar Metro
topPlaces.description: The Bhubaneswar Metro is a proposed rapid transit system for the twin cities of Bhubaneswar and Cuttack in Odisha, India. In the first phase, a 30 km (19 mi) metro trunk route will be created from SCB Medical College in Cuttack to the Biju Patnaik International Airport in Bhubaneswar.

The presiding deity is a Siva-lingam within a circular yonipitha inside the sanctum, which is 1.15 meters below the chandrasila.

Kalabhairavi Temple is located at Bhubaneswar of Odisha, India (Location Lat- 20°21’ 40", Long- 85° 50’ 77", Elev- 76 ft) within the Jaleswar Siva Temple Precinct, Kalarahanga. The enshrined deity is a four armed Chamunda sitting over a dead body.

Gandarpur is a village located in the northern part of the district of Khordha in the Indian state of Odisha. In 2011, the population was 3,109 persons in 606 households.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (12 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (9 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalikadevi Temple, Jaleswar Siva Temple Precinct, Kalabhairavi Temple, Central Tool Room and Training Centre, Bhubaneswar, Chandrasekharpur.
